query.query_string: Botulinum toxin type A AND open-angle glaucoma

data.query: Botulinum toxin type A AND open-angle glaucoma

results.title: Can hemifacial spasm lead to glaucomatous changes?
results.abstract: To evaluate the association between hemifacial spasm (HFS) patients and glaucoma as a function of the Botox dosage required.

results.title: Unilateral glaucomatous damage in a patient with hemifacial spasm.
results.abstract: We report a patient with hemifacial spasm of the right hemiface and ipsilateral glaucomatous optic neuropathy. No risk factors were found to explain the unilateral glaucoma. Ocular pressure readings were always within normal range.
results.journal: Ophthalmologica. Journal international d'ophtalmologie. International journal of ophthalmology. Zeitschrift fur Augenheilkunde
